description: TEMPLATE — Copy this file to config/project-manifest.json and fill in your project details. Replace ALL fields marked REQUIRED. Delete all _comment fields before committing. Schema v2.0.0 (v1.0.0) adds: status (lifecycle/gated/archived/staleness), meta (markets/ai_capabilities/ownership_type/repo_topology). Backwards-compatible: legacy fields (project.stage, project.active) preserved.

project._comment_id: REQUIRED. Lowercase, hyphenated. Must match keys in compliance.per_project, payment_projects, hipaa_projects, regulated_projects.
project.name: Your Project Name
project.vertical: SaaS | AI | FinTech | HealthTech | LegalTech | EdTech | Other
project.description: [REQUIRED] One sentence describing what this project does and who it serves. Include market geography (CA/US/AU/EU) for compliance inference.

status._comment: v1.0.0+ schema. Drives sync_portfolio behavior — archived projects are skipped, gated projects flagged 🔐, needs_update projects surfaced.
status._gated_comment: Set to true for regulated/sensitive projects (e.g., GulfLaw.AI). When true, Maxim refuses work until explicit user approval is given in this session.
status._gated_approval_comment: If gated:true, set this to the GitHub username or email that must approve. Approval given verbally in chat counts; Maxim logs the approval event.
status._archived_reason_comment: If lifecycle:archived, document WHY (e.g., 'Market not mature at launch — AirTap'). Used by sync_portfolio reporting.
status._last_activity_comment: Last commit/work date. Auto-updated by SessionEnd hook + sync_portfolio. Drives staleness warnings.
status._staleness_comment: Days without activity before sync_portfolio surfaces this project as needs_update.

meta._comment: v1.0.0+ NK-universe taxonomy. Used by mxm-portfolio MCP for cross-project queries and by content-strategist/seo-specialist for market-aware copy.
meta._ownership_comment: vertical = lives under a mega_platform parent (e.g., FixIt under iServices.io).
meta._parent_comment: If ownership_type is 'vertical', set parent's project.id (e.g., FixIt → 'iservices'). null otherwise.
meta._markets_comment: Multi-select array. CASL applies if 'canada'. UAE-PDPL applies if 'middle_east'. Triggers compliance.frameworks auto-suggestions.
meta._ai_capabilities_comment: Multi-select. Used by /mxm-portfolio for AI capability dashboards.
meta._repo_topology_comment: Prevents confusion when Maxim detects a junction or submodule. junction-guard skill enforces read-only access through junctions.

portfolio._comment: REQUIRED. One entry per project in this portfolio. Repeat block for each project.
portfolio.name: Your Project Name

compliance._comment: Declare ALL markets your project targets. project.id below MUST match keys in per_project and in payment_projects/hipaa_projects/regulated_projects exactly.

tech_stack._comment: Fill in all subsections. Use [TBD] for anything not yet decided. Agents use this to tailor code generation, security checks, and infrastructure advice.

frontend.ui_library: [TBD] e.g. shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI, Chakra UI
frontend.auth: [TBD] e.g. Clerk, Supabase Auth, Auth0, NextAuth

backend.framework: [TBD] e.g. FastAPI, Express, Django, NestJS, Go/Gin
backend.task_queue: [TBD] e.g. Celery + Redis, Bull, BullMQ, none
backend.storage: [TBD] e.g. AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Supabase Storage

infrastructure.cloud: [TBD] e.g. AWS, GCP, Azure, DigitalOcean, Hetzner
infrastructure.compute: [TBD] e.g. ECS Fargate, Lambda, Railway, Fly.io, VPS
infrastructure.ci_cd: [TBD] e.g. GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI
infrastructure.observability: [TBD] e.g. Sentry + Datadog, Langfuse, OpenTelemetry, none
infrastructure.secrets: [TBD] e.g. AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault, Doppler, .env

domains._comment: OPTIONAL. Declare all public-facing domains for this project. Used by security and infrastructure agents.

development._comment: OPTIONAL. Helps agents understand repo layout and workflow conventions.
development.monorepo_path: [TBD] e.g. platform/ or src/ or apps/ — leave blank if not a monorepo
development.workflow: [TBD] e.g. feature branch → PR → code review → squash merge → auto-deploy

documents._comment: OPTIONAL. Declare key project documents so agents can reference them. Paths relative to project root.

build_target._comment: Default build/test target. Claude SSHs here unless user says 'build locally'. Set default to 'local' to disable remote-first behavior.

remote.test_command: [TBD] e.g. docker compose exec api pytest or npm test

local_fallback.trigger: User says 'build locally', 'test locally', or 'run on my machine'
local_fallback.command: [TBD] e.g. npm run dev or docker compose up

full_portfolio_registry._comment: Complete list of all projects. Used by /mxm-tasks and /mxm-portfolio for cross-project awareness.

cross_project_patterns._comment: Shared patterns across projects. Auto-detected by Maxim agents. Example: { 'auth': { 'source': 'project-a', 'used_in': ['project-b', 'project-c'] } }

jurisdiction_matrix._comment: Per-project compliance jurisdictions with specific law references. Extends compliance.per_project.

bootstrap_templates._comment: Set selected to one of the keys below to activate a bootstrap template for /mxm-new-project.

review_queue._comment: Controls how generated skills, gap fixes, and staleness items are delivered for review. 'local' writes to .mxm-skills/review-queue.md (surfaced by /mxm-ceo-morning). 'github_pr' creates branches and PRs with labels for CI validation and sprint triage.

agent_overrides._comment: OPTIONAL. Per-project agent behavior overrides. Leave overrides[] empty for standard Maxim behavior.
agent_overrides.description: Per-project agent behavior overrides. Leave empty for standard Maxim behavior.

super_user._comment: Set enabled to true to suppress Maxim governance gates for power users. Claude's own values layer is not affected by this flag.
super_user.note: Set enabled: true and identity to activate super user mode. Maxim governance gates only — Claude's own values layer is not affected.
